author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Decision: Add ExpFastF64Op/ExpFastF32Op as WithSimd impls in dispatch.rs with dedicated dispatch_exp_fast_f64/f32 functions. Modify exp_fast in explog.rs to call these instead of unary_slice_op_f64/f32. The WithSimd impl just loops calling exp_fast_f64 with #[inline(always)] — pulp compiles the with_simd body for each ISA tier (SSE2, AVX2, AVX-512), so LLVM auto-vectorizes the AVX2+ versions. No explicit SIMD intrinsics needed.
